wallets.name: RoEUDIW
wallets.description: Romania's national European Digital Identity Wallet (RoEUDIW), led by the Authority for the Digitalization of Romania (ADR) with implementation involving MEDAT, MAI, and STS. Romania has formally adopted Germany's open-source EUDI Wallet solution; the first phase (mobile app, PID issuance, age verification) is planned for 2026. QTSP partners include certSIGN and Trans Sped.
